$comment: We deploy the Astro static site over HTTPS, but the splat-optimize API
currently runs on an HTTP-only host (DigitalOcean droplet at
167.99.231.209:8080). Browsers block mixed-content HTTP fetches from
HTTPS pages, so the upload UI silently fails with /healthz did not
Fix: rewrite /api/* on this HTTPS origin to the HTTP backend. The
browser only ever sees same-origin HTTPS requests; Vercel does the
HTTP egress server-side, which is allowed.
